scripts.dev:web: npm run build:contracts && npm run sync:assets && npm --workspace @slaythelist/web run dev
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace @slaythelist/api run dev
scripts.app:dev: npm run build:contracts && npm run sync:assets && npm --workspace @slaythelist/desktop run dev
scripts.app:package: npm run sync:assets && npm run build && npm --workspace @slaythelist/desktop run package
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run sync:assets && npm --workspace @slaythelist/api run build && npm --workspace @slaythelist/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contracts && npm run typecheck -ws --if-present
